title: Christian
writer: Eduard Simácek, Martin Fric, Josef Gruss
actors: Oldrich Nový, Natasa Gollová, Raoul Schránil
plot: Alois Novák (Oldrich Nový), a minor clerk in a travel agency and the husband of a dowdy housewife Marenka (Natasa Gollová), lives a run-of-the-mill, dull life. In his soul, however, there resides an inextinguishable desire for adv...
